pi_items.source: Task description and verifier scripts enforce this specific text for the Service name.
Task description and verifier scripts enforce 125.00 as the required service price.
Task description and verifier scripts enforce this specific text for the Quote subject.
Setup script synthetic generation logic (PHP) explicitly creates this product.
Task description instructs 2.0 quantity, and verifier enforces it.
Task description instructs 6.0 quantity, and verifier enforces it.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for vtiger_crm_env create_service_and_mixed_quote task by confirming that the prerequisite Account ('TechNova Solutions'), Contact ('David Chen'), and Product ('Cisco Meraki MX68 Router') are synthetically generated and injected via setup_task.sh PHP script. Verified that the expected service name ('Network Installation & Setup'), service price (125.00), quote subject ('TechNova - Branch Network Setup'), and exact required quantities (Product qty 2, Service qty 6) precisely match both the explicit task description instructions and the verifier.py evaluation logic.
